name: librtlsdr0
title: librtlsdr0
summary: Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (library)
description:
Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (library)
rtl-sdr is a software defined radio (SDR) receiver software for certain
low-cost DVB-T/DAB(+) USB dongles based on the Realtek RTL2832U chip.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use librtlsdr0 because Software defined radio receiver for Realtek RTL2832U (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use librtlsdr0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair librtlsdr0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `librtlsdr0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
